case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA VS. MIGUEL GONZALEZ JR.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-05-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ JR., MIGUEL $1,072.58 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,157.58, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-04-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-08-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE WAS UNWILLING TO STIPULATE TO HAVING THE MATTER HEARD BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE VIRGINIA HO, CLAIMS ADJUSTER FOR THE CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MUNICIPAL TRANSPORATION AGENCY. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MICHAEL GONZALEZ, JR.
